summary: MEM-02 completed: bounded the review queue, applied 214 deterministic holds, collapsed 687 duplicate members into 37 provenance-complete merge reviews, proved exact rollback/reapply across 1,839 paths, added cold partitions and hot exclusion, refreshed the live vault, and pushed app/data evidence.
decisions: Keep at most 500 hot review units and route budget overflow or unavailable admission state to cold hold.
Auto-hold only deterministic generated-memory classes; low-signal singletons remain manual review.
Merge exact and high-confidence near duplicates only within compatible kind and behavior scope while preserving all source hashes and provenance.
Use logical hash-bound cold partitions without moving source truth.
Public review summaries contain aggregate counts and hashes only.
Keep the global OS completion goal active because MEM-03 and later packages remain.
next_steps: Start MEM-03 correction writeback and behavior-lift implementation.
Continue bounded manual semantic review of the remaining 146 review units.
Decide explicitly whether to rewrite public Git history containing the pre-sanitization versions of two legacy worklist summaries.
